text: For the reproducible setup, the base model was Flux2 Klein Base 4B, trained with ai-toolkit.
pronounce_text: For the reproducible setup, the base model was Flux two Klein Base four B, trained with ai-toolkit.

text: The training resolution was 768 by 768. The dataset used 70 paired samples.
pronounce_text: The training resolution was seven hundred and sixty-eight by seven hundred and sixty-eight. The dataset used seventy paired samples.

text: Batch size was 1, gradient accumulation was 1, the optimizer was AdamW 8-bit, the learning rate was 1e-4, and the LoRA rank was 32.
pronounce_text: Batch size was one, gradient accumulation was one, the optimizer was AdamW eight-bit, the learning rate was one e four, and the LoRA rank was thirty-two.

text: The run used 20,000 training steps on one RTX Pro 6000, taking about 6 hours.
pronounce_text: The run used twenty thousand training steps on one RTX Pro six thousand, taking about six hours.

text: One important finding was that more data did not automatically mean better results.A carefully selected set of around 50 pairs could already produce usable outputs, while thousands of randomly selected pairs made quality worse.
pronounce_text: One important finding was that more data did not automatically mean better results.A carefully selected set of around fifty pairs could already produce usable outputs, while thousands of randomly selected pairs made quality worse.

text: For this task, quality, diversity, and structural correctness were more important than raw dataset size.
pronounce_text: For this task, quality, diversity, and structural correctness were more important than raw dataset size.
